title: Peckia guyanensis
taxonomy: Peckia guyanensis belongs to the family Sarcophagidae, which is a group of flies commonly known as flesh flies. This classification places it within the order Diptera, which comprises two-winged flies. Further, it falls under the class Insecta, highlighting its status as an insect. At the phylum level, Peckia guyanensis is classified as Arthropoda, indicating its arthropod nature. Its kingdom classification places it within Animalia, signifying its status as an animal.
